titleStmt.title: SII 9.161: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 161. (A.R. No. 515 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE SOMESVARA TEMPLE AT CHINNA-TUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 17, Āṅgirasa Vaiśākha, puṇṇame, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1092 April 24, Saturday with a lunar eclipse, in the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. It records that the Brāhman Kaliga or Kalidēva-Daṇḍanāyaka caused the construction of the Sōmēśvara temple and that Chōḷamahārāja-Ghaṭeyaṇa made a gift of the village Sogayanūru for the service of the god. The Daṇḍanāyaka Kaliga is said to have set up silver pinnacles over the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cāravētraiḷōkyana
sambhavē svasti samastabu
llabha(ṁ)mmahārājādhirā
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvara vija
rābhivridhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi pānuṁgallaynū
nāḷuttaṁ tadādēśadiṁ dakṣiṇaviśayada rakṣaṇa
ṇabhujādaṁḍanenisi(r)ḻda samadhigatapaṁca
sabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara bhujabaḷābhinava
svara nijakuḷōdyānavanavasaṁta vijayalakṣmīkā
tta saṁdhyāvaṁdanōdabiṁdukuḷamukuḷitārakavallarī
kyeya . sattyarādhēyananudinārādhitacaṁdralēkhō(ṁ)
ttaṁsa dharmmakathākarṇnāvataṁsa gōbrāhmaṇapādapāṁsupā
vanalalāṭapaṭṭa rāṣṭrakaṁṭakadiśāpaṭṭa hutāsana
mukhājyāhutisatasaṁtuṣṭadēvatāsamāja vibudhaja
nakalpabhūja srutismritinivēditadharmmānuraktadharma
naṁdana patihitamarunnaṁdana catussaṣṭikaḷāvi
ḷāsinībhujaṁgaṁ cāḷukyacakrivikramādityadakṣiṇadō
rddaṁḍamukhanisitacakra paracakracakra vīrasiṁhā
sana drōhamaṁḍaḷikamastakasūla parapakṣahariṇa
sārddūla rāyabaṁgāṟa permmāḍi karataḷakaḷitaghanavajragrā
va maṟivugekāva paramaṁḍaḷikasūṟekāṟa vikramādittya
naṁkakāṟa Ubhayabaḷasubhaṭamukhadarppaṇa sōḍasārttijana
saṁtarppaṇa rūpayauvanacāturyyamadāvaṣṭaṁbha vividhaviśa
yamāninīmānamudrāvidrāvaṇa nīḷagaḷanikētana dvāramaṁga
ḷatōraṇa caṁdaladēviya gaṁdhavāraṇa tribhuvanamalladēva
pādasaḷcaraṇa guṇagaṇābharaṇa śrīsōmēsvaradēvalabdhavaraprasā
da śrimanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsaraṁ kaligabhūpa . Akuṭiḷadharmmadoḷne
ga(r)ḻda dharmmasuta baḷadoḷmarutsutaṁ . prakupitavairisaṁharaṇa
doḷvijayaṁ jayakuṁtaviddeyoḷnakuḷanapārabōdhaguṇadalsahadē
vanenalke pāṁḍupaṁcakarumaneyde pōlva kalidēvanripāḷananorbaneṁ
budē . parikise pauriṣadoḷkaḍuvīriyaggada pāṁḍuputrarī kali
yugadēteraviṁgēkeyo kammarivāydaru himadoḷeṁbanavanipa
tanaya . palavu(ṁ) nnālige pēḷkuṁ kaliyugakinisottuvogadatidhā
rmmika maṁḍalikaṁ kaligananeṁto jaḍarasananoṁdaṟoḷba(ṁ)ṇnisuveṁ

ḷī vakrasāli tannoḷbhāsura
radapāṇigaḷaṁ taradiṁde maṁda
tiṣṭisi manaṁbuge tuṁbigeyoḷne
varasāmariguṁjaṁ śrīkaravēda
duvōdisuva dharāmararige maṁḍalika
puruṣara sannidhiyaloppe chatramaniṭṭu
sogayipalaṁdī sāyirada tāydoṟeve
ṇneya tīradalli digghigeyalumāparaṁge
kalidēvanripāḷakanoppe māḍi divyagriha
mittaḷaṁkaraṇamittēḷgeymaneyiṭṭa chatra
murvvige paḍicaṁdamādavene dhārmmi
kadharmmajanēṁ kritārtthanō . bayatala
nukramaṁbiḍidu māḍisi māḍisalā
ṟadokka sūṁḍiyalire dēvatālayama
nīkṣise namnanāgi saktiya namagennadavayduma
ttyacalabhaktiparaṁ ghaṭimuṭṭigaṁḍanū
rmmeya neṟegeyse tāṁ kaḷasamiṭṭanidēṁ kali
gaṁ kṛtārtthano . balinagarakke mūgenisidā
tṛpurāṁtakadēvatālayāvaḷi munivatri
lōcanana bhūpatirājiya piṁde pirggi pitta
leseteyilladallugutamiṟdedanīkṣisi
bircci māḍe maṁḍalikalalāmanēṁ nilise
nindavo beḷḷiya beṭṭa nilvavōl .

śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ ka
liyamarasaru
sōmēśvaradēvara dēgu
lamaṁ māḍisalu cā
ḷukyavikramakāla 17 ne
ya Āṁgi(ṁ)rasaṁvatsarada vai
sākhada puṇname sōmagrahaṇado
pottibacōḷamahārājaṁ ghaṭeya(ṁ)
ṇnaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ pāvuḷakkaṁ bi
ṭṭa piriya sōgeyanūru Idanā
vaṁ pratipāḷisadātaṁgabhyu
dayamāgi sāsira kavileya
prayāgeyaldānaṁgeyda phala
kiḍisida pāpige koṁda dōśamakku
nayadiṁdiṁtidaneyde kāva puruśaṁ
gāyuṁ mahāśrīyumakkumida kā
yade kāyva pāpige kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷu
vāraṇāsiyoḷekkōṭi munīṁdraruṁ kavi
leyuṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdadoṁdayasaṁ sārggu
menutte sāṟidapudī saiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētvasuṁdharā .
saṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
